output.name: repository_structure_analysis_summary
output.purpose: Cross-reference synthesis over the four prior repo-analysis outputs: input coverage, per-input signal lifts, cross-input observations, suggested category tags, and a human summary.
output.use_instruction: Generate the repository_structure_analysis_summary output conforming to schema-repository_structure_analysis_summary.

input.name: repository_structure_analysis_code
input.purpose: Code structure analysis covering tech stack, modules, build tooling, and quality gates.
input.use_instruction: Lift code_signals fields verbatim. Use for cross-reference observations (tech stack vs. specialized guides, multi-module vs. ADR presence).

input.name: repository_structure_analysis_conceptual_docs
input.purpose: Conceptual documentation inventory covering README, field guides, glossaries, user manuals, and API docs.
input.use_instruction: Lift conceptual_docs_signals fields verbatim. Use for cross-reference observations (AI-generated doc evidence vs. conceptual doc quality).

input.name: repository_structure_analysis_work_docs
input.purpose: Work documentation inventory covering ADRs, specs, planning artifacts, and work-in-progress state.
input.use_instruction: Lift work_docs_signals fields verbatim. Use for cross-reference observations (work-doc richness vs. AI orchestration depth, ADR presence vs. multi-module scale).

input.name: repository_structure_analysis_ai_process_inventory
input.purpose: AI process inventory covering MCP config, CLI scripts, prompt templates, snippet signals, and AI-generated doc evidence.
input.use_instruction: Lift ai_process_signals fields verbatim. Use for cross-reference observations (snippet tech-stack signals vs. code tech stack, template collections vs. work-doc richness).
